title: Game coordinator controller split
summary: Make one narrow behavior-preserving split out of the main game coordinator so future station, route, and debug work has a safer extension point.

execution_order.goal: Identify one small coordinator responsibility to extract from `game.ts`, favoring station/menu input or debug serialization seams.
execution_order.why_now: The beta foundation needs steadier code shape, but only after Source to Shore state behavior is anchored.

execution_order.goal: Implement the selected controller split with behavior-preserving tests and no gameplay feature changes.
execution_order.why_now: A narrow extraction reduces future edit pressure in `game.ts` without derailing beta feature work.

execution_order.goal: Review the split for simpler ownership, unchanged behavior, and absence of premature framework growth.
execution_order.why_now: Architecture cleanup earns its keep only if the next agents can understand and extend it faster.

completion_gate: One clearly named coordinator responsibility is extracted or isolated with less pressure on `game.ts`.
Runtime behavior, input behavior, save/debug behavior, station flow, and route flow remain unchanged.
Focused runtime/save/input coverage passes, plus build if TypeScript structure changes.
Architecture docs are updated only if the new boundary is durable.
guardrails: No renderer rewrite, state-machine rewrite, save schema change, or framework migration.
Follow existing code style and helper patterns.
Stop at the first useful seam rather than turning this into a broad refactor.
post_packet_path: Record any additional coordinator seams as future packets instead of taking them in this wave.
Use this split as a proof that architecture work can stay small and useful.

scout_handoff.gate: `ECO-20260428-main-453` remains parked until route-flow consolidation and route-catalog extraction have clean critic review, ending with `ECO-20260428-critic-452`.
recommended_shape: Extend the existing `src/engine/field-station-session.ts` module instead of adding a new framework.
Add `FieldStationSurface = 'season-routes' | 'season-expedition' | 'nursery'` and pure helpers for surface cycling, route/support/upgrade selection, nursery card cycling, and selection normalization.
Leave key polling, audio, notices, route-note filing, upgrade purchasing, outing-support cycling, expedition activation, and nursery project actions in `src/engine/game.ts`.
Keep `src/engine/game.ts` as the coordinator, but delegate only the station selection calculations to the helper module.
non_goals: No Source to Shore route-state changes.
No route catalog changes in this packet.
Do not move the debug-state exporter in this wave.
proof_plan: Add `src/test/field-station-session.test.ts` for surface cycling, support/upgrade wrap, nursery-card wrap, and selection normalization.
`npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t 'field station|outing support|season capstone|High Pass|Source to Shore'`
Only capture native `256x160` browser proof if renderer/layout files change unexpectedly.

implemented_shape: Added pure helpers for station surface cycling, route/support selection cycling, nursery-card cycling, and selection normalization.
Kept input polling, audio cues, filing, upgrade purchases, support toggles, expedition activation, nursery actions, notices, saves, and debug export behavior in `src/engine/game.ts`.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t 'field station|outing support|season capstone|High Pass|Source to Shore'
npm test -- --run src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'station|High Pass|Source to Shore'
main_implementation.handoff: Promote `ECO-20260428-critic-453` to review that this stayed a narrow station/session split with unchanged gameplay behavior.

verification: npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t 'field station|outing support|season capstone|High Pass|Source to Shore'
npm test -- --run src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'station|High Pass|Source to Shore'
critic_review.handoff: Packet 172 is clean; promote `ECO-20260428-main-456` for final Steady Beta full-arc signoff.
